Boss Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Buffoon Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Charm Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Coupon Tag.effect: On first entry to the next shop, all initial Jokers, consumables, and packs are free.
Coupon Tag.limits: Vouchers are not included. Items added after a reroll are not included.
Coupon Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

D6 Tag.effect: Reroll cost starts at $0 in the next shop.
D6 Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Double Tag.effect: Copies the next Tag obtained (cannot copy itself).
Double Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Economy Tag.effect: After skipping, doubles current money up to a maximum of $40.
Economy Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Ethereal Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Foil Tag.effect: A random base Joker in the next shop is free with Foil edition.
Foil Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Garbage Tag.effect: Earn $1 for each unused discard this round (paid at skip time based on remaining discards).
Garbage Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Handy Tag.effect: Earn $1 for each hand played this round (paid at skip time based on hands played so far).
Handy Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Holographic Tag.effect: A random base Joker in the next shop is free with Holographic edition.
Holographic Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Investment Tag.effect: Earn +$25 after defeating the next Boss Blind. Stackable.
Investment Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Juggle Tag.effect: +3 hand size for the next round.
Juggle Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Meteor Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Negative Tag.effect: A random base Joker in the next shop is free with Negative edition.
Negative Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Orbital Tag.effect: Upgrade one selected hand type by 3 levels.

Polychrome Tag.effect: A random base Joker in the next shop is free with Polychrome edition.
Polychrome Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.

Rare Tag.effect: A free Rare Joker appears in the next shop (occupies a shop slot).

Speed Tag.effect: Earn $5 for each Blind skipped this run (at least $5 when obtained).

Standard Tag.trigger: Obtained by skipping the shown Blind.
